categories.title: Encouraging Card Messages & Hype Texts
categories.description: Short, powerful texts and card messages to encourage someone taking a big step, starting a new job, or just needing a hype man.
messages: You've survived 100% of your bad days so far. You're going to crush this.
Take a deep breath. You are so much more capable than you realize.
I just wanted to remind you how proud I am of the person you are.
Your potential is endless. Go do what you were made to do.
I'm in your corner, today and always. You've got this.
No matter what happens, I am so incredibly proud of you.
You were literally built for this moment.
Don't let the imposter syndrome win today. You earned your spot here.
I believe in you so much it's actually ridiculous.
Whatever happens, we are getting ice cream after.

categories.title: Grief Support & Sympathy Card Messages
categories.description: What to write in a sympathy card when there are no words. Simple, supportive messages for someone who is grieving.
messages: There are no words. I'm just so incredibly sorry.
I am holding you in my heart today.
You don't have to be strong right now. I'm here for whatever you need.
I will always remember their wonderful spirit. Sending you all my love.
Please take all the time you need. I'll be right here when you're ready.
No need to reply. Just letting you know I'm thinking about you today.
I am coming over on Tuesday to do your laundry. Do not try to stop me.
I wish I could take this pain away from you.
It is completely okay if you are not okay.
Holding you close in my thoughts and hoping you find some peace.

categories.title: Anxiety Support & Grounding Texts
categories.description: Grounding messages and texts to send someone having a panic attack or struggling with severe anxiety.
messages: I'm right here. You don't have to reply. Just read this and know you are not alone.
Your body is trying to protect you right now. But you are completely safe.
This feeling is awful, but it is temporary. It will pass.
I love you, you are safe, and everything is going to be okay.
Do you want me to keep distracting you with stories, or do you want space? A or B.
Take one slow, deep breath for me. Then another.
Can you tell me three things in the room that are color blue?
I am not going to leave you. I'll stay on the phone as long as you need.
It's just adrenaline. Let it wash over you. It cannot hurt you.
You've felt this before and you survived. You will survive this too.

categories.title: Just Because & Thinking Of You Messages
categories.description: Because you don't need a crisis to tell someone they matter. Messages to make their day completely out of nowhere.
messages: Just a random reminder that I think you're pretty awesome.
I saw something today that reminded me of you and it made me smile.
No need to reply! Just wanted to say I'm so glad we're friends.
You make the world a little bit brighter just by being in it.
Hope your day is exactly as wonderful as you are.
I was just thinking about that time we [memory]. Hope you're having a good day.
If no one has told you today, you're doing a really good job.
Just texting to say I appreciate you and I'm lucky to have you in my corner.
Sending you a quick hug through the phone.
I hope the rest of your week is incredibly boring and peaceful.

categories.title: Breakup Support & Heartbreak Messages
categories.description: When their world just collapsed, platitudes don't work. Here's what to text a friend crying through a breakup.
messages: I am so angry that this is happening to you.
You are allowed to fall apart right now. I'll help pick up the pieces later.
I'm ordering pizza to your house. Don't worry about dinner.
It's okay to miss them and be furious at them at the exact same time.
I'll be over at 8. We can talk about it, or we can watch mindless TV in silence.
This hurts so much because it mattered. But it won't hurt this completely forever.
Block them. Give your phone to me if you need me to do it for you.
You do not deserve to be treated like an option.
You are so deeply loved by the people who are actually meant to be in your life.
Take it one hour at a time today.
